overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character running through a rainy night in a New Orleans-style neighborhood. The character moves along wet sidewalks past traditional wooden shotgun houses and ornate historic homes, eventually crossing into a commercial area with a pawn shop visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with power transmission lines

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the wet sidewalk past wooden houses with porches, passing a body lying on the grass

notable_agents.action: car with bright headlights driving past on the wet street, reflecting off the pavement

entered.detail: tall metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple high-tension wires spanning across the street
traditional weathered wooden house with front porch and shuttered windows
tall street lamp casting yellow-orange light through the rain
metal public trash receptacle on the sidewalk
dark figure lying prone on the grass between sidewalk and house

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a rainy residential sidewalk at night, passing traditional wooden houses while street lamps illuminate the wet pavement. A body lies on the grass to the left, and cars occasionally pass on the right with headlights cutting through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential street with ornate balconies

events.description: character navigates around a parked red car while maintaining running speed

agents.ego_description: continuing to run past increasingly ornate historic homes with decorative iron balconies and detailed woodwork

notable_agents.action: red and white vintage sedan parked along the curb with headlights off

entered.detail: historic house with second floor balcony, decorative brackets, and illuminated windows
classic 1960s style sedan with chrome details parked on the street

segments.scene_description: The character runs past more elaborate historic architecture featuring ornate balconies and decorative trim, navigating around a parked red vintage car. The power lines and initial houses recede into the background as the character moves deeper into the residential block.

events.description: transitioning from residential sidewalk to commercial intersection with pawn shop visible
crossing the wet street at crosswalk while cars wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly to cross the street at the crosswalk, navigating between waiting vehicles

notable_agents.action: person standing near the telephone booth on the corner

entered.detail: red and glass enclosed public telephone booth on the street corner
commercial building with illuminated PAWN & LOAN signage on the facade
two-story brick commercial structure with large ground-floor windows

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a commercial intersection, passing a telephone booth and crossing the wet street at the crosswalk. The Pawn & Loan shop becomes visible across the street as the character navigates through the intersection, transitioning from residential to commercial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner near elevated overpass

events.description: reaching the opposite sidewalk and continuing past commercial buildings toward the overpass

agents.ego_description: completing the street crossing and walking along the commercial sidewalk toward the distant overpass

notable_agents.action: distant figure holding an umbrella walking near the overpass

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway or railway bridge spanning across the background
triangular traffic sign mounted on a pole at the corner

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the commercial sidewalk with the pawn shop now to the left. An elevated overpass becomes visible in the distance against the rainy night sky, and a pedestrian with an umbrella walks in the far background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy residential neighborhood that gradually transitions into a commercial district at night. It begins with the character running along a wet sidewalk past traditional wooden houses, where street lamps illuminate the pavement and a body lies on the grass as cars pass by. As the character moves deeper into the block, the architecture shifts toward more elaborate historic homes with ornate balconies, requiring a navigation around a parked red vintage car. The scene then opens up at a commercial intersection, passing a telephone booth and crossing the street as the residential houses recede and a Pawn & Loan shop comes into view. Finally, the camera follows the character along the commercial sidewalk with the pawn shop to the left, moving toward a distant elevated overpass under the rainy night sky.
